title: Architecture Decision: PocketBase + FastAPI Hybrid
summary: Establishes PocketBase for auth/data/storage and FastAPI for reporting/automation as the definitive architecture, superseding all Phase 1-2 plans.
key_points: PocketBase handles auth, database (SQLite), and file storage via JS SDK
FastAPI handles reporting, automation, and aggregation only - NOT CRUD or auth
PocketBase email/password auth is the single auth approach (supersedes FastAPI token auth and NextAuth)
Tenant portal uses shared link tokens, not PocketBase auth accounts
7 PocketBase collections map to 9 Prisma models (RentAdjustment and ContactLog become JSON fields)
All landlord collections require @request.auth.id != '' authentication rules
Next.js is frontend-only with zero server-side logic (no Prisma, no NextAuth)
10 key decisions (D-01 through D-10) established as confirmed architecture
conflicts_with: .planning/research/STACK.md (suggested removing FastAPI - corrected to keep for reporting)
src/lib/AuthProvider.tsx (currently uses FastAPI token auth - must be rewritten to PocketBase)
